name: Shy Smiling Face
desc: A classic blushing face that represents warm, shy happiness. Perfect for receiving compliments or feeling bashful in a sweet way.

name: Shy Smiling Face (Classic)
desc: A more subtle version of the blushing smile, often used to convey a gentle, shy personality or a quiet sense of joy.

name: Shy Flushed Face
desc: Conveys being wide-eyed and shyly embarrassed. Ideal for moments when someone is put on the spot or feeling shy due to an unexpected situation.

name: Shy Pleading Face
desc: Often used to represent a shy request or feeling timid. This emoji captures a sense of vulnerability and shy longing.

name: Shy See-No-Evil Monkey
desc: The ultimate symbol for 'I'm too shy to look.' Perfect for bashful reactions, hiding from a crush, or being shy about a mistake.

name: Shy Pointing Fingers
desc: A popular combination representing the 'is for me?' meme. It is the digital equivalent of twiddling your thumbs nervously or shyly.

name: Shy Peeking Face
desc: Represents being shy but curious. Used when someone is scared or bashful but still wants to see what is happening.

name: Shy Melting Face
desc: Used when a compliment or situation makes someone so shy they feel like they are 'melting' into the floor from bashfulness.

name: Shy Giggle with Hand Over Mouth
desc: Represents a bashful laugh or hiding a shy reaction. Great for flirting or reacting shyly to a joke.

name: Shy Face in Clouds
desc: Can represent feeling socially shy or wanting to disappear into the background because of bashfulness or social anxiety.

name: Shy Turtle
desc: A metaphor for 'retreating into one's shell.' Used to describe someone who is being shy or quiet in a group setting.

name: Shy Cherry Blossom
desc: Often used in aesthetic posts to represent a soft, shy, or feminine energy. Pairs well with blushing emojis.

name: Shy Teddy Bear
desc: Represents the comfort and timidness associated with childhood or feeling shy and wanting to hide behind something soft.
